annotationlib/annotations_to_string.name: annotations_to_string
annotationlib/annotations_to_string.description: Convert an annotations dict containing runtime values to a dict containing only strings. If the values are not already strings, they are converted using type_repr(). This is meant as a helper for user-provided annotate functions that support the STRING format but do not have access to the code creating the annotations. For example, this is used to implement the STRING for typing.TypedDict classes created through the functional syntax: >>> from typing import TypedDict >>> Movie = TypedDict("mo...
